articles.title: AMD takes over MEXT to 'address growing memory constraints' in the data center — memory tiering technology enables flash to appear as DRAM to applications
articles.summary: AMD acquires MEXT to get Predictive Memory Engine that offloads infrequently accessed data from DRAM to NAND storage.
articles.title_zh: AMD 收購 MEXT 以「解決數據中心日益增長的內存限制」— 內存分層技術使 Flash 能夠對應用程序顯示為 DRAM
articles.summary_zh: AMD 收購 MEXT 以獲得 Predictive Memory Engine，該引擎可將不常訪問的數據從 DRAM 卸載到 NAND 存儲。

articles.title: GlobalFoundries: First Chipmaker to Support Open Standard for AI Scale Up
articles.summary: GlobalFoundries expects to be the first with silicon to support the Optical Compute Interconnect Multi-Source Agreement (OCI MSA), an open standard that will let AI data center operators connect GPUs from
articles.title_zh: GlobalFoundries：首個支持開放式 AI 規模擴展標準的芯片製造商
articles.summary_zh: GlobalFoundries 預計將成為首家支持光學計算互連多源協議（OCI MSA）的硅供應商，該開放標準將允許 AI 數據中心運營商連接來自不同廠商的 GPU。

articles.title: Modeling Multi-GPU Traffic For Distributed AI Workloads (UW Madison, AMD)
articles.summary: Researchers from University of Wisconsin-Madison and AMD Research and Advanced Development published a technical paper titled “Eidola: Modeling Multi-GPU Network Communication Traffic in Distributed AI Workloads.” Abstract: “As distributed AI workloads grow in scale, multi-GPU systems have become essential for training large models. Although techniques like kernel fusion and overlapping communication with computation help reduce delays, they also introduce irregular and transient traffic patterns that are difficult to model using existing tools. These techniques rely heavily on fine-grained synchronization and peer-to-peer communication, which place significant pressure on interconnect bandwidth and latency. In this work, we introduce Eidola, a scalable extension to the gem5 simulation fra
articles.title_zh: 分佈式 AI 工作負載的多 GPU 流量建模（威斯康星大學麥迪遜分校、AMD）
articles.summary_zh: 威斯康星大學麥迪遜分校和 AMD 研究人員發表了技術論文「Eidola：分佈式 AI 工作負載中的多 GPU 網絡通信流量建模」。

articles.title: Physical Neural Networks: A Survey (U. of Lübeck, TU Hamburg)
articles.summary: Researchers from the University of Lübeck and TU Hamburg published a technical paper titled “Beyond Silicon: Materials, Mechanisms, and Methods for Physical Neural Computing.” Abstract: “Physical implementations of neural computation now extend far beyond silicon hardware, encompassing substrates such as memristive devices, photonic circuits, mechanical metamaterials, microfluidic networks, chemical reaction systems, and living neural tissue. By exploiting intrinsic physical processes, such as charge transport, wave interference, elastic deformation, mass transport, and biochemical regulation, these substrates can realize neural inference and adaptation directly in matter. As silicon GPU-centered AI faces growing energy and data-movement constraints, physical neural computation becomes inc
articles.title_zh: 物理神經網絡：綜述（呂貝克大學、漢堡工業大學）
articles.summary_zh: 呂貝克大學和漢堡工業大學的研究人員發表了技術論文「超越硅：物理神經計算的材料、機制和方法」。

articles.title: From Prompt to Exploit: How LLMs Are Changing API Attacks
articles.summary: Modern applications are API-driven, interconnected, and often over-permissioned, making them an ideal target for AI-assisted attacks.

articles.summary_zh: 現代應用程序採用 API 驅動、互聯互通的架構，且通常權限過度，使其成為 AI 輔助攻擊的理想目標。

articles.title: iOS 27 basically turns your iPhone and AirPods into an Apple Watch at the gym
articles.summary: GymKit has been one of Apple Watch’s smartest fitness features since it launched in 2017. Tap your watch to compatible gym equipment, and Apple Watch shares your heart rate while the machine sends back metrics like distance, incline, pace, and calories. With iOS 27, Apple is expanding that idea beyond Apple Watch. I tested the new GymKit on iPhone and AirPods Pro 3 ($179, reg. $249) experience with a GymKit-compatible treadmill. It basically gives you the Apple Watch GymKit workout tracking experience, just without the watch. This could be useful in a lot of scenarios.
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 基本上將你的 iPhone 和 AirPods 變成健身房的 Apple Watch
articles.summary_zh: GymKit 自 2017 年推出以來一直是 Apple Watch 最聰明的健身功能；iOS 27 將這一概念進一步擴展。

articles.title: MagSafe Monday: Spigen turned a MagSafe wallet into a mini backpack
articles.summary: If you’re looking for a nice balance between a crossbody and a backpack when traveling or camping, you might be interesting to take a look at the Spigen Snapzip Mag Fit. I recently picked one up and am looking forward to using it while traveling. It can hold your AirPods, keys, cash, and much more. It’s like a mini backpack for your iPhone.

articles.title: Facebook is taking a page from Google’s playbook with these new features
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Facebook is getting an AI mode for enhanced search and exploration. Camera roll sharing suggestions are getting updated with collage cutout templates. Meta is also introducing AI photo presets that allow you to customize your hair, clothing, and accessories. Like most other tech companies these days, Meta has been increasingly infusing AI into many of its products. The latest instance of this will see three new AI-powered features roll out to Facebook. These features aim to enhance search and bring more creative tools to the social experience. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: The UK’s big new social media ban should have under-16s everywhere feeling nervous
articles.summary: TL;DR The United Kingdom has announced plans to ban children under 16 from social media by law. The UK’s forthcoming plan will be modeled on Australia’s, which requires platforms to verify users’ ages or face fines. Restrictions could take effect as soon as early 2027. The UK intends to ban young kids from social media. Under a newly announced initiative, starting early next year, social media platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, X, and more will need to verify that their UK users are 16 or older, with potential fines for failing to comply. The plan was announced today in a press release , as well as on Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s YouTube channel and Substack . The UK’s plan is modeled on Australia’s ban that came into force last year and similarly bars children unde
articles.title_zh: 英國的大型社交媒體禁令應該讓全世界 16 歲以下人士感到緊張
articles.summary_zh: 英國宣布計畫通過法律禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，將以澳洲模式為藍本，限制措施可能於 2027 年初生效。

articles.title: Onn’s new outdoor floodlight cam comes with Gemini integration for under $80
articles.summary: TL;DR Walmart’s new Onn Outdoor Floodlight Camera Hardwired is available now for $77. The camera has a resolution of 1080p and a field of view of 130.5 degrees. It also offers Google Home and Gemini support. Walmart recently introduced a new budget-priced connected outdoor camera in the $35 Onn Outdoor Camera Plug-In . Not long after, the retailer teased a version of the outdoor camera with an attached floodlight , but didn’t reveal much about it. Today, that new camera is up for sale. The new Onn Outdoor Floodlight Camera Hardwired seems to be the same camera as the Outdoor Camera Plug-In, just with floodlights added: Like the Outdoor Camera Plug-In, the Floodlight Camera features a 130.5-degree field of view and 1080p resolution. It costs $77.
articles.title_zh: Onn 的新戶外泛光燈攝像頭附帶 Gemini 整合，售價不到 80 美元
articles.summary_zh: 沃爾瑪新推出的 Onn Outdoor Floodlight Camera Hardwired 現已推出，價格為 77 美元，提供 1080p 解析度、130.5 度視角和 Google Home、Gemini 支持。

articles.title: Google Messages may soon make it easy to tell when your friends are sharing AI imagery
articles.summary: TL;DR Google Messages appears to be working on a system to let users check if images in chat are AI creations. The system appears to distinguish between wholly AI imagery and cases where AI was only used for edits. None of this is yet functional, but Google’s already making progress. Every day, we’re presented with an onslaught of images: browser ads, social media, news feeds — they’re everywhere. And increasingly, there’s a good chance that a plurality of those images might involve some kind of AI manipulation , if not full-on generation. While tools to recognize such pictures for what they are exist, oftentimes using them is far too manual of a process. But now it looks like Google could be streamlining how we access these solutions, especially when it comes to images sent through the Me
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 可能很快會讓你輕鬆了解朋友何時分享 AI 圖像
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages 正在開發一個系統讓用戶檢查聊天中的圖像是否為 AI 創作，並區分完全由 AI 生成與僅用於編輯的情況。

articles.title: Gemini call bug on Android Auto leaves drivers staring at error messages
articles.summary: Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority TL;DR Android Auto users are experiencing an issue with Gemini. When trying to make a call through Gemini, an error message pops up. The issue is causing some to switch back to Google Assistant Last week, Gemini went down for the count, as a partial outage left Google’s AI platform serving up error messages. While that issue has since been resolved, a new problem appears to have popped up over the weekend. Gemini appears to be acting up on Android Auto, preventing users from making calls. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: vivo T5 Lite specs leak

Both foldables are expected to debut in July alongside the Galaxy Z Flip8. Ultra-thin glass forms the top protective layer of a foldable phone's flexible AMOLED display. It helps reduce the crease while protecting the screen from drops. According to the report, the Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) will feature a 60μm-thick UTG. Leaked Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) render The taller Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, on the other hand, is...

articles.title: Why do South Koreans love AI so much?
articles.summary: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here . When I landed in Seoul after a grueling 12-hour flight from San Francisco, I walked through an unmanned immigration checkpoint, where a machine scanned my face and passport. On the subway home, people were glued to their phones (powered by flawless 5G even underground), as we raced past platforms lined with LED screens of ads celebrating K-pop idols ’ birthdays. When I got off the station in Gangnam, a cartoon-eyed robot on wheels was waiting patiently at a crosswalk to deliver someone’s dinner. Internet cafés dotted the sidewalks, crammed with teenagers playing computer games, maybe hoping to become the next legendary pro gamer . I stood at a bus stop
articles.title_zh: 南韓人為什麼這麼喜歡 AI？

articles.title: AWS WAF adds AI traffic monetization capability to help content owners charge AI bots for content access
articles.summary: AWS WAF now includes AI traffic monetization capability that gives digital content owners and publishers a way to charge AI bots and agents for access to protected web content directly at the network edge. The capability helps content owners and publishers set per-request pricing by content path, bot category, or verification tier without modifying their origin infrastructure or writing application code. Content owners can define granular access policies per agent type, collect payments in stablecoins to their preferred wallet, and monitor revenue and bot activity from a single dashboard. AI bot traffic now accounts for more than 50% of web traffic for many content providers, with AI-specific crawlers growing more than 300% year-over-year. articles.title: China's AI Markets Still 'A Source of Funds' Says Citigroup
articles.summary: Alicia Yap, Citi's head of Pan-Asia Internet Research, breaks down where China's tech market stands amid global AI adoption. But despite all this heavy corporate activity, Citigroup warns that global investors are still treating China tech as "a source of funds," with Wall Street dumping local stocks to fund the global AI hardware trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 花旗集團表示中國 AI 市場仍是「資金來源」
articles.summary_zh: 花旗泛亞網際網路研究主管 Alicia Yap 分析了中國科技市場在全球 AI 採用中的現狀。儘管企業活動頻繁，但花旗警告全球投資者仍將中國科技視為「資金來源」，華爾街正在拋售本地股票。

articles.title: SpaceX Stocks Still Volatile, Says JPMorgan Strategist
articles.summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management global market strategist, says to expect SpaceX volatility in the next six months. She also says they are expective some big high-profile AI names, but the IPO markets are still going to be selective. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: JPMorgan 策略師表示 SpaceX 股票仍然波動性大
articles.summary_zh: JPMorgan Asset Management 全球市場策略師 Stephanie Aliaga 表示應預期 SpaceX 在未來六個月內出現波動。她還表示預期一些知名 AI 公司，但首次公開募股市場將保持選擇性。

articles.title: SpaceX Capable of Building Orbital Data Centers, Says Former Meta CTO
articles.summary: Mike Schroepfer, former CTO of Meta and founding partner of Gigascale Capital - a venture firm making early-stage bets on companies focused on climate impact - says SpaceX is the only company capable of building orbital data centers. He also shares how ocean data centers are 100x cheaper than orbital ones. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Meta 前首席技術官表示 SpaceX 能夠建造軌道數據中心
articles.summary_zh: Meta 前首席技術官 Mike Schroepfer 表示 SpaceX 是唯一有能力建造軌道數據中心的公司。他還分享了海洋數據中心的成本比軌道數據中心便宜 100 倍。

articles.title: Cohere Seeing Inbounds After Washington's Anthropic Scrutiny
articles.summary: Cohere Chief AI Officer Joelle Pineau says Cohere has seen a huge number of inbounds after Anthropic was ordered by the US government to disable access to its most advanced AI platforms for all foreign nationals, with governments and investors alike now seeking non-US models as Washington steps up its AI oversight. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Cohere 在華盛頓對 Anthropic 審查後收到大量商詢
articles.summary_zh: Cohere 首席 AI 官員 Joelle Pineau 表示，在美國政府要求 Anthropic 禁止外國公民訪問其最先進 AI 平台後，Cohere 收到大量商詢。政府和投資者現在尋求非美國模型，因為華盛頓加強審查。

articles.title: What Is Anthropic’s Mythos AI and Why Was It Blocked?
articles.summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant released Mythos to only 200 partner organizations because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.
articles.title_zh: 什麼是 Anthropic 的 Mythos AI 以及為什麼被阻止？
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic PBC 表示其新型人工智慧工具 Mythos 在發現軟體和計算機系統漏洞方面表現出色，無法向公眾發布。該公司僅向 200 個合作夥伴組織發布了 Mythos，以防如此強大的工具落入不當手中。

articles.title: Polymarket Traders Clash Over $345 Million Iran Peace Market
articles.summary: A proposed deal to end hostilities between the US and Iran gave equities and bond traders a measure of relief on Monday. It also left prediction markets with a new headache.
articles.title_zh: Polymarket 交易員就 3.45 億美元伊朗和平市場發生衝突
articles.summary_zh: 美國和伊朗之間結束敵對行為的提議交易給股票和債券交易員帶來了一些緩解。預測市場也隨之面臨新的難題。

articles.title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space
articles.summary: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 太空數據中心建設競賽
articles.summary_zh: 「太空中的數據中心」聽起來像科幻小說，但隨著 SpaceX 首次公開募股預示著太空繁榮，科技巨頭和初創公司正在押注軌道人工智慧是下一個前沿。

articles.title: Key mission for Europe's commercial space enterprise scrubbed again
articles.summary: Isar Aerospace still commands top position among a new generation of European rocket startups, but the company's efforts to launch a critical test flight of its Spectrum rocket continue to encounter roadblocks. The latest delay came Monday, when Isar scrubbed a launch attempt after "detecting off nominal behavior in the vehicle's fluid systems," according to a social media post. "The teams are analyzing the new data to isolate the root cause." The two-stage, 92-foot-tall (28-meter) Spectrum rocket was awaiting liftoff from Andøya Spaceport in northern Norway. It was the fourth time in five months that Isar Aerospace, headquartered near Munich, Germany, had reached a target launch date for the second test flight of the Spectrum launch vehicle. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 歐洲商業太空企業的關鍵任務再次被取消
articles.summary_zh: Isar Aerospace 在新一代歐洲火箭初創公司中仍佔據領先地位，但該公司進行 Spectrum 火箭關鍵試飛的努力持續遭遇障礙。最新延遲發生在週一，當時 Isar 在檢測到異常後取消了發射嘗試。

articles.title: Heart protection from COVID shots remains amid updates, study finds
articles.summary: Although most Americans have eschewed seasonal COVID-19 vaccines, the updated shots continue to show significant protection against cardiovascular disease, especially for those over age 75 and those with underlying medical conditions. That's according to a new study that pulled data from more than 1 million patients in a US Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) health system. The finding builds on previous data showing that the vaccines significantly lower the risk of COVID-19-associated cardiovascular risks, particularly heart attacks and strokes. But it wasn't a given that the benefit would hold up over time—as the virus evolved, the vaccines were updated, population-level immunity increased from previous infection and vaccination, and risk of severe outcomes fell. The new study, published
articles.title_zh: 研究發現 COVID 疫苗的心臟保護作用仍然存在
articles.summary_zh: 儘管大多數美國人已放棄季節性 COVID-19 疫苗，但更新的疫苗持續顯示對心血管疾病的重大保護作用，特別是對 75 歲以上人群和有潛在疾病的人群。這是根據一項涉及超過 1 億條數據的新研究得出的結論。

articles.title: UK to ban social media for kids under 16, may impose overnight curfews
articles.summary: The UK government announced today that it will ban social media for all kids under the age of 16 in rules expected to take effect in spring 2027. The ban will apply to platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X. "We’re going further than any country in the world by banning social media for under-16s and putting wider protections in place to give kids their childhood back," Prime Minister Keir Starmer said in the announcement. In addition to the ban on social media, Starmer's government said it will impose "world-leading blocks on harmful functions such as livestreaming and stranger communication with children for under-16s... Restrictions on these functionalities will also be on by default for 16- and 17-year-olds to prevent a cliff-edge at 16." The livestrea
articles.title_zh: 英國禁止 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，可能實施夜間宵禁
articles.summary_zh: 英國政府宣布將禁止所有 16 歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，該規則預計於 2027 年春季生效，涵蓋 Snapchat、TikTok、YouTube、Instagram、Facebook 和 X 等平台。英國表示這是全球範圍內對青少年社交媒體使用的最嚴格禁令。

articles.title: Chipmaker Nvidia seeks to raise over $25B in first bond deal since 2021
articles.summary: Chipmaker Nvidia is planning to sell $25 billion of investment-grade debt in the US on Monday, its first bond sale in five years, in a test of investor appetite for further exposure to the AI sector. In a marquee seven-part bond offering, the company will issue a wide range of maturities from two years to 30 years, according to a term sheet seen by the FT. The issuance was upsized from $20 billion after receiving more than $85 billion in orders by early afternoon in New York, according to people familiar with the deal. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 芯片製造商 Nvidia 尋求在 2021 年後首次債券交易中籌集超過 250 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 芯片製造商 Nvidia 計劃在週一在美國發售 250 億美元的投資級債券，這是其五年來的首次債券發行，測試投資者對進一步暴露於 AI 領域的興趣。該公司將通過七部分債券發行提供多種期限。

articles.title: A Chinese rocket breaks apart dangerously close to the Starlink constellation
articles.summary: The upper stage from a commercial Chinese rocket that launched last week has broken apart in space, spreading debris in a heavily trafficked part of low-Earth orbit home to the International Space Station and a significant portion of SpaceX's Starlink broadband network. The breakup occurred shortly after the Zhuque-2E rocket reached orbit on June 9 with two satellites providing direct-to-cell communications, perhaps around the time the upper stage was expected to perform a disposal burn. The US Space Force confirmed the breakup event in a post on space-track.org , a website used by the military to distribute orbit data to the public. "The tracked pieces are being incorporated into routine conjunction assessment to support spaceflight safety," the Space Force wrote in an advisory. "There ar
articles.title_zh: 中國火箭在距離 Starlink 星座危險近距離處散裂
articles.summary_zh: 上週發射的商業中國火箭上級在太空中散裂，在國際空間站和 SpaceX Starlink 寬帶網絡的重要部分所在的繁忙低地軌道區域散布了碎片。散裂發生在不久前。

articles.title: Fox’s $22B Roku acquisition aims to expand its reach into smart TVs, advertising
articles.summary: Fox Corporation has agreed to buy Roku Inc. for $160 per share, an approximate enterprise value of $22 billion, the firms announced today. The acquisition would unite Fox’s broadcast channels, including Fox, Fox News, Fox Business, and FS1, as well as its streaming businesses, including Tubi, a free ad-supported streaming television (FAST) platform that Fox bought in 2020, with Roku’s own FAST service, The Roku Channel, and Roku’s streaming hardware business, including its streaming sticks and smart TVs. Roku says it has 100 million households using its platform. The most valuable part of Roku’s business isn't its hardware, which lost $19.1 million in the quarter ending March 31, 2026, but its the operating system (Roku OS) and advertising business. In that same quarter, Roku’s advertising
articles.title_zh: Fox 220 億美元 Roku 收購旨在擴大其在智能電視和廣告領域的影響力
articles.summary_zh: Fox Corporation 同意以每股 160 美元的價格收購 Roku Inc.，企業價值約為 220 億美元。此次收購將整合 Fox、Fox News、Fox Business 和 FS1 等 Fox 廣播頻道，以及 Tubi 等流媒體業務。

articles.title: Users cry foul after AMD stripped memory crypto from its consumer CPUs
articles.summary: A decade ago, AMD added a protection to its high-end CPUs to protect them against cold boot attacks and other types of physical exploits that siphon sensitive data out of the connected memory chips. Short for Transparent Secure Memory Encryption, TSME encrypts the entire contents stored in memory, making the data useless to physical attackers. Over time, AMD added TSME to lower-end processors, including the consumer version of its Ryzen chips, a CPU that costs less than the Pro version. Over the years, users of these lower-end chips have gotten used to the added security. Recently and without warning or notice, this lower-end line of AMD chips suddenly dropped the protection, and did so in a way that was impossible to detect on Windows machines and required a fair amount of technical work
articles.title_zh: 用戶抗議 AMD 從其消費者 CPU 中移除了內存加密功能
articles.summary_zh: 十年前，AMD 在其高端 CPU 上添加了保護機制以防禦冷啟動攻擊和其他類型的物理漏洞。TSME（全名 Transparent Secure Memory Encryption）加密存儲在內存中的全部內容，但 AMD 現已從消費者 CPU 中移除了此功能。

articles.title: Salesforce買下AI客服平臺Fin
articles.summary: Salesforce周一（6/15）宣布，將以約36億美元收購AI客服平臺Fin，以強化旗下Agentforce代理人產品布局。
articles.title_zh: Salesforce買下AI客服平台Fin
articles.summary_zh: Salesforce宣布以約36億美元收購AI客服平台Fin，以強化旗下Agentforce代理人產品布局。

articles.title: UpdraftPlus WordPress外掛程式修補重大身分驗證繞過漏洞，未更新可能導致攻擊者取得管理員權限
articles.summary: 資安業者Wordfence於6月10日揭露，擁有超過300萬部署數量的WordPress網站備份外掛程式UpdraftPlus，存在重大繞過身分驗證漏洞CVE-2026-10795，CVSS嚴重性評分達8.1分，可能導致未經驗證的攻擊者以管理員身分控制網站，UpdraftPlus已於1.26.5版完成修補，用戶應儘速更新。
articles.title_zh: UpdraftPlus WordPress外掛程式修補重大身分驗證繞過漏洞，未更新可能導致攻擊者取得管理員權限
articles.summary_zh: 資安業者Wordfence於6月10日揭露，擁有超過300萬部署數量的WordPress網站備份外掛程式UpdraftPlus，存在重大繞過身分驗證漏洞CVE-2026-10795，CVSS嚴重性評分達8.1分，可能導致未經驗證的攻擊者以管理員身分控制網站，UpdraftPlus已於1.26.5版完成修補，用戶應儘速更新。

articles.title: 90天完成AI治理起手式，Check Point資安長教你用5個步驟搞定
articles.summary: 隨著企業導入AI速度越來越快，開始將更多工作搭配或交由AI處理，責任歸屬的認定可能出現混亂，換言之，一旦發生意外狀況，可能大家並不清楚相關責任該由誰承擔，因為這牽涉到企業AI治理的缺失，Check Point亞太及日本區資安長 Jayant Dave最近來臺介紹一套能快速理解與實施的框架，這是他參考NIST與ISO兩大標準組織的相關框架，以及雲端控制指標（AI 模型大多部署於雲端環境），用商業語言加以簡化而成，區分為5個步驟、3個實施階段，而且能在90天完成。
articles.title_zh: 90天完成AI治理起手式，Check Point資安長教你用5個步驟搞定
articles.summary_zh: 隨著企業導入AI速度越來越快，開始將更多工作搭配或交由AI處理，責任歸屬的認定可能出現混亂，換言之，一旦發生意外狀況，可能大家並不清楚相關責任該由誰承擔，因為這牽涉到企業AI治理的缺失，Check Point亞太及日本區資安長 Jayant Dave最近來臺介紹一套能快速理解與實施的框架，這是他參考NIST與ISO兩大標準組織的相關框架，以及雲端控制指標（AI 模型大多部署於雲端環境），用商業語言加以簡化而成，區分為5個步驟、3個實施階段，而且能在90天完成。

articles.title: 中國駭客組織UNC6508鎖定美國醫療與國防研究機構竊取機密
articles.summary: Google威脅情報團隊（GTIG）揭露由新興中國駭客組織UNC6508發起的大規模網路間諜行動，鎖定北美學術、醫療與軍事研究社群的機構，在長達逾一年的潛伏期間，攻擊者入侵對外開放的網路應用程式、部署客製化惡意軟體、滲透進敏感內部系統，並濫用企業管理工具進行隱密的資料外洩。GTIG與Mandiant Consulting聯手。摧毀惡意基礎設施，並通知受害機構及提供協助。
articles.title_zh: 中國駭客組織UNC6508鎖定美國醫療與國防研究機構竊取機密

articles.title: Palo Alto Networks警告VPN高風險漏洞遭積極利用
articles.summary: Palo Alto Networks日前發出安全公告，警告PAN-OS漏洞CVE-2026-0257在先前出現少量利用嘗試後，如今已遭攻擊者積極利用。Palo Alto安全監控中心Unit 42觀測到一個身分未明的攻擊組織濫用該漏洞，以存取其VPN系統GlobalProtect。
articles.title_zh: Palo Alto Networks警告VPN高風險漏洞遭積極利用
articles.summary_zh: Palo Alto Networks警告PAN-OS漏洞CVE-2026-0257已遭攻擊者積極利用，攻擊組織濫用該漏洞以存取VPN系統GlobalProtect。

articles.title: OpenRouter推出Fusion，以多模型協作提升AI研究能力
articles.summary: AI模型路由平臺OpenRouter上周四（6/12）推出Fusion功能，可同時呼叫多個AI模型回答同一問題，再由另一模型整合成最終答案，並宣稱Fusion可在深度研究任務中產生比單一模型更完整的答案。

articles.title: LiteSpeed修補cPanel外掛程式已遭利用的權限提升重大漏洞，若未更新可能導致攻擊者取得底層共享主機Root權限
articles.summary: 美國網路安全與基礎設施安全局（CISA）於6月15日公告，將網站伺服器平臺LiteSpeed的cPanel外掛程式漏洞CVE-2026-54420，加入已遭利用的漏洞列表（KEV），限期聯邦機構完成修補。

articles.title: 伊朗駭客Handala傳出入侵加州水務公司，洩露GPS基礎設施憑證、客戶個資
articles.summary: 美伊戰爭持續進行，伊朗駭客也傳出試圖對美國的關鍵基礎設施下手，藉此進行報復。

articles.title: HPE推VM Essentials新方案，鎖定評估更換虛擬化平臺的企業客戶
articles.summary: 在本週舉行的年度用戶大會期間，HPE宣布新的虛擬化平臺遷移方案，鎖定正在評估更換既有虛擬化平臺的企業客戶。

articles.title: ENISA歐盟網路演習邁入第八屆，2026聚焦鐵路與海運領域
articles.summary: 歐盟網路安全局（ENISA）於6月10日至11日展開兩年一度的大型網路安全演習「Cyber Europe 2026」。此次演習為第八屆，核心目標為實測歐洲各國面對大規模跨境網路攻擊的集體應變能力、協作機制，以及關鍵基礎設施的復原韌性。

articles.title: Threads大規模誤封事件突顯社群平臺年齡驗證挑戰，Meta坦承技術錯誤急修復
articles.summary:
Meta旗下社群平臺Threads與Instagram在周日到周一之間無預警爆發大規模帳號停權事件，許多臺灣使用者突然收到系統通知，指帳號因「未滿13歲」而遭到停用，造成用戶的不便。受影響對象橫跨政治人物、媒體機構、網紅與一般用戶，包括多位具有高知名度的公眾人物帳號一度無法正常使用。Meta事後坦承，這起事件是因年齡判定機制的技術錯誤，導致部分帳號被誤判為未滿13歲，正著手修復系統，目前一部分用戶的帳號已恢復。
這次事件之所以受到高度關注，不只是因為影響範圍廣泛，更因為遭停權的帳號多為已公開經營多年的媒體或公眾人物帳號，使外界質疑平臺自動化審查與身分驗證機制的可靠性。

articles.title: 網路釣魚即服務平臺SniperDz遭瓦解，主要開發者與管理員在阿爾及利亞落網
articles.summary: 資安調查與威脅情報業者Group-IB於6月11日揭露，他們協助國際刑警組織（INTERPOL）與阿爾及利亞警方，瓦解運作近10年的網路釣魚即服務（PhaaS）平臺SniperDz。

articles.title: 資安專家連署反對Anthropic Claude Fable/Mythos禁令
articles.summary: 在美國政府下達禁止外國人使用Anthropic Claude Fable/Mythos模型的命令後，上百名資安專家昨（6/15）日連署發表公開信，說明AI對資安的重要性，要求政府官員解除禁令。

articles.title: 英國也要禁止16歲以下使用社交媒體，盼讓孩子重拾童年
articles.summary: 英國政府周一（6/15）宣布，將禁止16歲以下兒童使用社交媒體，並針對直播、陌生人聯繫及AI戀愛聊天機器人等功能祭出額外限制。政府表示，此舉獲得9成家長支持，預計於今年底前提交國會審議，最快2027年春季上路，希望減少兒童沉迷網路的時間，讓孩子找回童年。

articles.title: Linux基金會成立由Databricks貢獻的OpenSharing專案，推動AI資產與資料交換標準化
articles.summary: Linux基金會（The Linux Foundation）於6月10日宣布成立OpenSharing Project，這項專案源自資料與AI平臺業者Databricks的貢獻，是一個強調開放與廠商中立（vendor-neutral）的交換協定，用於建立跨雲端、跨資料平臺的共通交換規範，讓企業能安全分享資料、AI模型與代理技能（Agent Skills）等資產。

articles.title: AWS推出FinOps Agent公開預覽版，協助企業追查雲端成本異常
articles.summary: 雲端服務業者AWS於6月9日宣布推出雲端成本管理工具AWS FinOps Agent公開預覽版，定位為代理式AI解決方案，可協助企業追查雲端成本異常、找出可能原因，並讓工程師透過自然語言查詢AWS成本與用量資料。

articles.title: 思科修補SD-WAN系統已遭利用的漏洞
articles.summary: 6月15日思科發布資安公告，指出旗下的Catalyst SD-WAN Manager（原SD-WAN vManage）存在任意檔案寫入漏洞CVE-2026-20262，通過身分驗證的攻擊者可遠端在檔案系統建立新的檔案，甚至能覆寫已經存在的任何檔案，CVSS風險評為6.5分，影響內部建置、雲端，以及政府機關專用版本。值得留意的是，思科已掌握漏洞遭到少量利用，再加上沒有其他緩解措施，呼籲用戶儘速套用新版軟體因應。

articles.title: These are the best iPadOS 27 features you should try [Video]
articles.summary: Last year, Apple blew me away with the new multitasking features in iPadOS 26. It felt like a true step forward, giving us a more Mac-like experience. This year, iPadOS 27 aimed to tighten everything up and give us the best version of iPadOS we have ever seen. The update might not have been as flashy as last year’s, but it has made my iPad smarter, faster, more capable, and the performance now feels drastically improved. There are 100s of new small tweaks and changes, but I wanted to share my five favorite features you need to try.

articles.title: No Liquid Glass slider for Apple Watch, but here’s how watchOS 27 design changes
articles.summary: With iOS 27, Apple is giving iPhone users a slider to customize how clear or frosted Liquid Glass appears. While the same slider comes to the Mac and iPad, Apple Watch just has one Liquid Glass setting for everyone. However, watchOS 27 does change the look of Liquid Glass on Apple Watch in subtle ways.

articles.title: Nimble’s SharePower power bank snaps in half so you can share a charge
articles.summary: Nimble, the maker of many interesting iPhone accessories, is launching a new product called SharePower, which it bills as the world’s first sharable battery. Nimble says SharePower will be available in Apple retail stores and on Apple’s website.

articles.title: SpaceX purchases Cursor, a Claude Code and OpenAI Codex competitor [U]

articles.title: Adobe survey: AI is helping creators grow, but not without tradeoffs

articles.title: New Verizon plans and loyalty program announced with Austin Powers ad campaign

articles.title_zh: Verizon 推出新方案和忠誠度計畫，並推出 Austin Powers 廣告活動

articles.title_zh: Mophie 宣布三款新的高級 25W MagSafe 充電器 for iPhone：上手試玩
articles.summary_zh: Mophie 推出全新高級 25W MagSafe 充電產品系列供 Apple 使用者使用，採用創新的冷卻技術方案。

articles.title: Apple faces yet another EU antitrust investigation, this time for preferencing iCloud
articles.summary: Apple’s antitrust battles with the European Union are many and varied, and it may now be facing yet another one. Italy’s competition regulator has today opened an investigation into whether Apple illegally preferences iCloud over third-party cloud services – and says it will be sending a report to the EU Commission …
articles.title_zh: Apple 面臨另一項歐盟反壟斷調查，這次是因為偏好 iCloud
articles.summary_zh: 義大利競爭監管機構已開啟調查，調查 Apple 是否非法偏好 iCloud 勝於第三方雲端服務。

articles.title: Reports of iPhone Ultra launch delays are ‘false,’ says leaker
articles.summary: Alongside question marks on whether the first folding iPhone will be branded as the iPhone Fold, iPhone Ultra , or something else, there’s also been uncertainty about the launch timings. (I’m going to refer to it as the iPhone Ultra purely to avoid clumsy phrasing.) There have been multiple reports suggesting that the launch could be significantly delayed, but a new comment from a leaker with a decent track record says otherwise …

articles.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage & protect Apple devices at work. articles.title: Android 17 gives foldables the virtual gamepad they’ve always deserved
articles.summary: Foldables combine the extra-large displays of a tablet with something a little more pocket-friendly, especially on modern ultra-thin devices like the Galaxy Z Fold 7. But for all the potential that arrives with that big screen, it can sometimes be difficult to find software that perfectly scales for those square displays. Thankfully, with Android 17, gaming on foldables is getting a huge boost with a new set of virtual controls.
articles.title_zh: Android 17 為可摺疊裝置提供它們應得的虛擬遊戲手把
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 為可摺疊裝置提供虛擬遊戲手把功能，幫助軟體更好地適配大螢幕。

articles.title: Is your Pixel getting Google’s massive Android update for June 2026? Here’s the full list
articles.summary: If you own a Google Pixel, you probably bought your phone because you value timely software updates. You also probably know that not all updates are created equal. Some are jam-packed with tons of new features, while others are nothing more than boring bug fixes. Google is now rolling out its latest Pixel update for June 2026, and thankfully, it’s very much the former type of update. In fact, it’s the biggest update we’ve seen from Google so far this year.
articles.title_zh: 您的Pixel正在獲得Google 2026年6月的大型Android更新嗎？完整列表在此
articles.summary_zh: Google正推出其最新的Android更新，某些更新包含大量新功能，而其他則僅為漏洞修復。

articles.title: Pixel Watches can now keep your inner circle notified in an emergency
articles.summary: Credit: Kaitlyn Cimino / Android Authority TL;DR Google is rolling out a new Pixel feature called “Emergency Sharing.” Emergency Sharing is designed to work with the Pixel’s core incident detection features, like Car Crash and Fall Detection. If a severe event is detected, Emergency Sharing will notify your chosen contacts and call emergency services. It’s not something anyone wants to think about, but emergencies are a part of life. In these moments, Pixel devices offer a range of features to help ensure your safety, like Emergency Contacts and Fall Detection . With today’s Pixel Drop, Google is extending the Pixel’s list of incident-related tools with a new feature. For those with a Pixel Watch, you’ll soon have access to a feature called “Emergency Sharing.” This feature is designed to
articles.title_zh: Pixel Watch現可在緊急情況下通知您的內部圈子
articles.summary_zh: Google推出新的Pixel「Emergency Sharing」功能，與Pixel的事件檢測功能（如車禍和跌倒偵測）搭配運作。

articles.title: Pixel phones are now better at multitasking, thanks to Android 17’s Bubbles
articles.summary: TL;DR The June Pixel Drop brings the “Bubbles” multitasking feature to Pixel phones. It lets users open up to five apps in floating bubbles for quick, easy access without switching away from the app they are using. Bubbles are available on all Pixel devices running Android 17. The June Pixel Drop is here, and if you are a multitasker, it’s got a feature that you are going to love: Bubbles. With this feature, you can long-press any app icon to open it in a “Bubble.” The app then opens in a small floating window. Once you tap out of it, it minimizes itself into a small floating bubble on your screen.
articles.title_zh: 感謝Android 17的Bubbles，Pixel手機現在多工能力更強
articles.summary_zh: 6月Pixel Drop為Pixel手機帶來「Bubbles」多工功能，允許用戶在浮動氣泡中打開最多五個應用程式。

articles.title: June Pixel Drop brings a Pixel 10-exclusive feature to the Pixel 10a
articles.summary: TL;DR The June Pixel Drop is bringing the Pixel 10-exclusive “Voice Translate” feature to the Pixel 10a. It translates your voice into the listener’s language and even mimics your voice. Among the many new features introduced with the Pixel 10 series was “ Voice Translate .” It lets users communicate with people who speak a different language by automatically translating both sides of the call into the listener’s language. With the June Pixel Drop , Google is finally bringing this mode to the Pixel 10a. With Voice Translate, Pixel 10a users will be able to take full advantage of the AI-powered tool to have seamless conversations with people who speak a different language. In fact, it will even mimic your voice so the translated speech sounds like you. All you need to do is go to Call Assis
articles.title_zh: 6月Pixel Drop將Pixel 10獨占功能帶至Pixel 10a
articles.summary_zh: 6月Pixel Drop為Pixel 10a帶來Pixel 10獨占的「Voice Translate」功能，可將您的語音翻譯為聽眾的語言。

articles.title: Android 17 introduces a new Foldable Gaming Mode, but there’s a massive catch
articles.summary: TL;DR Android 17 introduces a new Foldable Gaming Mode: a 50/50 layout that places your game on the top half of your foldable’s inner display and a virtual gamepad on the bottom half. Google says Foldable Gaming Mode is enabled in Android 17, but it will be available only in the coming months. Android 17 also brings controller remapping and more efficient memory cleanup. Google has officially started rolling out the stable build of Android 17 to supported Pixel devices, while other eligible smartphones and foldables will receive it throughout 2026. If you are a foldable user, a couple of exciting gaming-related features are coming your way. Meet Android 17’s Foldable Gaming Mode. After getting initial testing started with a Canary build for developers, Wear OS 7 is now ready for its big public debut. articles.title: Android 17 stable is officially rolling out to Google Pixels, here’s what’s new!
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Android 17 stable is officially rolling out to Pixel 6 and later devices, with the source code headed to the Android Open Source Project. Devices will also see strict app memory limits to cure UI stutters, an independent Assistant volume stream, and an upcoming foldable gaming mode. Months after Android 17 began beta testing, Google is finally ready to release Android 17 stable to the world. articles.title: 8 new features coming to your Pixel phone with the June Pixel Drop

This Pixel Drop brings AirDrop support to more budget Pixels, Custom Greetings in Take A Message, and new Gemini models. Google is also bringing several pre-existing Pixel features to new markets. Google’s quarterly Pixel Drops are always cause for celebration, as the company brings new features and improvements to its Pixel devices . We’ve been eagerly waiting for the June Pixel Drop, and the day has finally come. There’s no shortage of additions in this Pixel Drop, but what are the most notable features this time? articles.title: Android 17 makes it easier for parents to manage their kids’ screen time with these new controls
articles.summary: TL;DR Android’s built-in parental controls are expanding and will be available on devices updating to Android 17. Parents can manage screen time, app access, content restrictions, and bedtime schedules directly from Android settings, with deeper controls available through Family Link. Google is also investing over $50 million in digital wellbeing initiatives to promote healthier technology habits and address social isolation among young people. Giving a child a smartphone often comes with an unspoken second job: constantly figuring out how much screen time is too much. Google is trying to simplify that process by making Android’s built-in parental controls available on a much wider range of devices. The company first rolled out Android’s built-in parental controls on Pixel phones last year

The Fitbit Air, Google’s take on WHOOP-style fitness tracking, officially launched in May . Since its launch, there’s been a lot of positive feedback, despite lacking a screen. While the band is already fairly affordable at $99, it just became even easier to grab one. According to Google , the Fitbit Air is now officially certified as Health Savings Account (HSA) and Flexible Spending Account (FSA) eligible. That means you’ll now be able to use your pre-tax health savings funds to purchase Google’s latest Fitbit device.

articles.title: Why I’d never buy an Android phone with 8GB RAM in 2026
articles.summary: Whether you’re buying a high-end PC or the latest flagship smartphone , RAM is a precious commodity these days. The crunch in global supply has driven prices to record highs, making it harder and more expensive to get our hands on cutting-edge memory at a reasonable price. At the same time, the market is pushing AI features on us at an accelerating pace, and, as you probably know, on-device AI tools require a lot of RAM. If you didn’t, the problem is quite simple: local models running on your phone (or laptop) rather than in the cloud have to be loaded into RAM to run at an acceptable speed.
articles.title_zh: 為什麼我在 2026 年永遠不會購買配備 8GB RAM 的 Android 手機
articles.summary_zh: 隨著全球供應短缺，RAM 價格創歷史新高，在 2026 年購買 8GB RAM 的智慧型手機已不符合成本效益。

articles.title: Breaking: Galaxy S26 series gets third One UI 9 beta release with major bug fixes
articles.summary: Credit: Aamir Siddiqui / Android Authority TL;DR Samsung has released the third One UI 9 beta for the Galaxy S26 series. The 1,786MB update (firmware ZZF7) includes the June 5, 2026, security patch and fixes key issues involving the privacy display, camera preview screen, camera zoom, and more. Currently live in Germany, India, Poland, the UK, and South Korea, the new update will soon be available in the US as well. New month, new One UI 9 beta. Following on the heels of the first and second betas , Samsung has now released the third One UI 9 beta update for the Galaxy S26 series. We’ve received the third One UI 9 update on our Galaxy S26 Ultra in the UK. This Android 17-based update comes with firmware version ending in ZZF7, the June 5, 2026 security patch, and is 1,786MB in size.
articles.title_zh: 速報：Galaxy S26 系列推出第三個 One UI 9 測試版，修復重大錯誤
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 發佈 Galaxy S26 系列的第三個 One UI 9 測試版，包含 June 5, 2026 安全補丁和多項關鍵修復。

articles.title: I spent 48 hours comparing Siri AI to Gemini — and Apple really impressed me
articles.summary: It’s safe to say Apple has taken its sweet time bringing its AI ambitions to fruition. After debuting Apple Intelligence two years ago, Apple unveiled a whole new Siri at WWDC 2026 last week. Dubbed Siri AI, the completely rebuilt virtual assistant is a complete overhaul of the much-maligned, on-device voice assistant with Apple Intelligence underpinnings. Obviously, I couldn’t wait to get my hands on it, so I rushed to install the iOS 27 developer beta and signed up for the Siri AI waitlist. Since then, I’ve spent the last 48 hours or so testing out the newfangled AI assistant and comparing it with Google Gemini.
articles.title_zh: 我花了 48 小時比較 Siri AI 與 Gemini — Apple 真的讓我印象深刻
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在 WWDC 2026 上推出全新重建的 Siri AI，展現出令人印象深刻的性能和功能改進。

articles.title: This free Android app brings all your emulated games under a single console-style roof
articles.summary: Credit: Nathan Lohnes TL;DR A new app called iiSU combines all your emulated games from various emulator apps into a single UI. It also supports social features, including hovering Discord chats, as well as dual-screen compatibility. iiSU is now out in alpha and available to download for free. In recent years, we’ve seen countless Android gaming handhelds , some with overkill specs and support for multiple game platforms. But one thing that stands out is that most handhelds require initial legwork to set up to your liking . Even as brands such as ANBERNIC and Retroid have started to come with certain popular emulators preinstalled, managing titles can feel clunky because of the archaic and unsightly interfaces on some of these devices. Thankfully, there have been efforts not only to replac
articles.title_zh: 這款免費 Android 應用將您所有的模擬遊戲集中在單一主機式介面下
articles.summary_zh: iiSU 應用將各種模擬器遊戲整合至單一介面，支持社群功能和雙螢幕相容性，現已開放免費下載。

articles.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 FCC listing confirms key details about Samsung’s wide foldable
articles.summary: Credit: Android Headlines TL;DR Samsung’s Galaxy Z Fold 8 or Wide Fold has been listed by the FCC. The regulatory filing all but confirms that the device has a Snapdragon processor. The listing also mentions specs like satellite connectivity, UWB, reverse wireless charging, and DisplayPort support. Samsung’s upcoming products, including its foldables and smartwatches, were recently listed in the FCC’s database . The Galaxy Z Fold 8 (or Wide Fold) wasn’t spotted at the time, but the new foldable has now received a regulatory listing. The apparent Galaxy Z Fold 8, bearing model number SM-F971U, was listed in the FCC’s database late yesterday (June 15). This model number matches previous Wide Fold leaks.
articles.title_zh: Galaxy Z Fold 8 FCC 列表確認 Samsung Wide Foldable 的關鍵細節
articles.summary_zh: Galaxy Z Fold 8 通過 FCC 認證，確認採用 Snapdragon 處理器，並支援衛星連接、UWB 和反向無線充電。

articles.title: Spotify adds emoji reactions to collaborative playlists
articles.summary: Spotify has found a way to make contributing to collaborative playlists more engaging and fun – emoji reactions. With it, contributors to a playlist can react to each other’s additions with ❤️, 😂, 👍, 🎧, 🔥 and🥹. The person who added the song will get a notification over Spotify Messages, which will let them know how others in the group feel about the song. This is just for the insiders, though, only the owner of the collaborative playlist and the contributors can see the reactions. Collaborative playlists in Spotify now support emoji reactions And if this doesn’t sound like a...

articles.title: Lenovo Tab Plus Gen 2 launches with 9 JBL speakers and a 12.1" LCD with Dolby Vision
articles.summary: The Lenovo Tab Plus was announced in mid-2024 and it had only 8 JBL speakers – that may not have been enough for some, so here comes the second generation model with 9 JBL speakers. The Lenovo Tab Plus Gen 2 supports Dolby Atmos – the Dolby Audio processing can be set to Dynamic, Movie and Music modes. Interestingly, it has a Bluetooth speaker mode if you want to play music from your phone with more oomph than the phone’s speakers can provide. The Lenovo Tab Plus Gen 2 has 9 JBL speakers The Gen 2 model has a larger 12.1” LCD (up from 11.5”) with Dolby Vision and HDR10 support. It...

articles.title: More details about the OnePlus 16's screen leak
articles.summary: According to a new rumor from Digital Chat Station on Weibo, the OnePlus 16's screen will have a 185Hz refresh rate. The company was previously rumored to be testing going up to 240Hz, but it allegedly cancelled those plans as such a high refresh rate "could affect the display" and "may not be feasible for widespread adoption" (both phrases machine translated from Chinese, so there might be some accuracy issues). The display panel itself has already been ordered from China's BOE, and it will be a 6.78-inch size with "1.5K" resolution. Compared to the OnePlus 15's screen, it has higher...

articles.summary: Oppo launched the Reno16 and Reno16 Pro in China last month, and now the devices are on their way to Europe with different specs. According to the information in the EPREL database, the European Reno16 and Reno16 Pro both have a 6,000 mAh battery, while the lower-end Reno16 F has a 6,500 mAh cell. articles.title: Huawei’s vertical tri-fold emerges in patent

Just like the Mate XT Ultimate, the vertical tri-fold features two hinges that help it retract to a neatly compact form...

articles.title: Redmi Turbo 5 with Dimensity 8500-Ultra SoC, 7,540mAh battery debuts in India
articles.summary: The Redmi Turbo 5 is now available in India following its launch in China earlier this year. It sports a 6.59-inch flat AMOLED display with a refresh rate of 120Hz, 3,500 nits peak brightness, and 1.5K resolution. The Dimensity 8500-Ultra SoC is kept cool with the help of a 3D ice-loop...

articles.title: The new Sharp Aquos R11 gains a 38.5MP tele camera, Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 chipset

A sequel to the Aquos R10, this phone adds a telephoto camera, upgrades to a higher tier chipset, offers a mixed bag of display and camera improvements and removes the microSD slot. Okay, that sentence started strong, but didn’t end on a high note. The R11 has a 6.5” Pro IGZO OLED display (1,080 x 2,340px resolution) with 1-240Hz refresh rate. With 3,600 nits peak brightness, it is the brightest display on an Aquos phone yet, beating the R10...

articles.title: Tecno Spark 50 Pro unboxing and hands-on
articles.summary: Following the Tecno Spark 50 5G and Spark 50 4G, Tecno unveiled the Pro member of the series. We have the Spark 50 Pro with us, so let's see what it's all about. Let's start by opening the box and see what's inside it. Unboxing the Tecno Spark 50 Pro The device ships along with a USB-A to USB-C cable used for charging and data transfer, a compatible Tecno charger rated at up to 60W and a soft-touch silicone case that matches the device's color. The Spark 50 Pro's design, especially the Dynamic Orange, is quite reminiscent of the iPhone 17 Pro/Pro Max. You can also get it...

articles.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO

articles.title: Want to get a data center online quickly? Give it some flex.
articles.summary: At the end of a tense and scoreless first half of a soccer match between the English men’s team and rival Germany, millions of Brits let out a collective sigh and did what they so often do in moments of stress: They made tea. That wave of electric kettles clicking on, however, caused a different kind of stress: a huge and sudden increase in demand for electricity. But National Grid, which operates the local transmission network, was ready. Just as those kettles started heating up, an AI program sent instructions to a data center in London to slow down some of the facility’s power-hungry chips. This reduction helped make sure there was enough supply to match demand, staving off potential blackouts or damage to electrical hardware. For data centers, which normally guzzle power without consid
articles.title_zh: 想快速上線資料中心？使用靈活方案。

articles.title: Comcast rolls out same-day access to broadband gateways

articles.title: Why did my AWS bill spike? There’s now an agent for that
articles.summary: Amazon Web Services has added a third specialized “frontier agent” to its growing portfolio of AI tools aimed at IT operations — this one focused on the cloud bill. AWS FinOps Agent , which the company moved into public preview last week, follows the earlier debuts of AWS’s Security Agent and DevOps Agent . It enters a domain that has historically relied on dashboards, spreadsheets, and a human analyst’s knowledge, and hands it to an agent that can be asked questions in plain English and that can act on its own when something looks wrong. In this case, the domain is FinOps — the discipline of getting engineering, finance, and business teams to share accountability for cloud spending. AWS frames the new agent as a response to a shift it says is already un
articles.title_zh: 我的 AWS 帳單為何飆升？現在有 agent 可以幫忙
articles.summary_zh: Amazon Web Services 新增第三個專門的「frontier agent」到其 AI 工具組合中，專注於雲端帳單管理。AWS FinOps Agent 已進入公開預覽階段，是繼早前 AWS 推出的其他 agent 後的最新產品。

articles.title: The siloed-data era is over. Here’s what comes next for AI agents.
articles.summary: Some 700 million people now use ChatGPT every week. Now , the next phase of AI is well underway, as agentic AI undertakes autonomous task execution and multi-step, dynamic workflows. According to PwC’s AI Agent Survey , 79% of senior executives say their companies have already adopted AI agents, and two-thirds report measurable productivity gains. That hype overshadows the reality for many, though, as failure rates for enterprise AI can reach 95%, according to one MIT study . Meanwhile, Gartner predicts that more than 40% of agentic AI projects will be canceled by the end of 2027 due to high costs, unclear business value, and inadequate risk control. Why do some AI projects go astray? Poor-quality data, a lack of organizational knowledge, and insufficient context can limit the effect
articles.title_zh: 資料孤島時代已結束。AI agent 的下一步是什麼？
articles.summary_zh: 約 7 億人現在每週使用 ChatGPT，AI 已進入新階段，agent AI 執行自主任務和多步驟動態工作流。根據 PwC 的 AI Agent 調查，79% 的高階主管表示公司已採用 AI agent。

articles.title: Anthropic pauses Claude Agent SDK subscription change on day it was due to take effect
articles.summary: Anthropic has hit pause on a billing change affecting developers who use its Claude Agent SDK through a paid subscription — pulling back on the very day it was scheduled to go live. The announcement comes after a turbulent week for Anthropic. On June 9, the company released Fable 5 and Mythos 5 — its first generally available Mythos-class models , built with hardened cybersecurity guardrails — only for the US government to issue an export control directive days later , forcing Anthropic to pull both models for all customers worldwide. Now, it seems, Anthropic is looking to bring a little good news to its global user base, by holding off on a billing change that may have cost many developers and third-parties more for their automated Claude usage. Splitting usage Back in M

articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 暫停了影響付費訂閱 Claude Agent SDK 開發者的計費變更，在該變更原定上線的當天宣布此決定。此公告發布時值 Anthropic 經歷動盪的一周之後。

articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 連續第三天上漲，有望超越 Amazon.com 的市值，並一度成為全球第四大股票，超越 Microsoft。

articles.title: Snap Launches $2,195 Specs, Declaring Glasses the Next Computer
articles.summary: Snap Inc. introduced Specs, a $2,195 pair of augmented reality glasses that co-founder Evan Spiegel described as a leapfrog advancement and the computer of the future.
articles.title_zh: Snap 推出 2,195 美元智慧眼鏡，宣佈眼鏡為下一代電腦
articles.summary_zh: Snap 推出售價 2,195 美元的增強現實眼鏡 Specs，聯合創始人 Evan Spiegel 將其描述為革命性進展和未來的電腦。

articles.title: HPE Boosts Networking Gear for AI Clients, Adds Siemens Energy
articles.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. introduced new networking gear for artificial intelligence data centers, building on the products it acquired from Juniper Networks and striving to capture more of the demand for AI tools from corporate customers.
articles.title_zh: HPE 為 AI 客戶推出網路設備，並增加 Siemens Energy
articles.summary_zh: Hewlett Packard Enterprise 推出新型網路設備供人工智慧資料中心使用，並整合 Juniper Networks 收購的產品，以滿足企業客戶對 AI 工具的需求。

articles.title: Apollo-Backed Rackspace Loan Jumps on AMD Data Center Deal
articles.summary: Rackspace Technology Inc., a cloud-computing services company backed by Apollo Global Management Inc., saw its $1.6 billion loan jump after it signed a data center deal with Advanced Micro Devices Inc., extending a rally in debt that had traded at deeply distressed levels just two months ago.
articles.title_zh: Apollo 支持的 Rackspace 貸款因 AMD 資料中心交易而上漲
articles.summary_zh: 由 Apollo Global Management 支持的雲計算服務公司 Rackspace 與 Advanced Micro Devices 簽署資料中心交易，其 16 億美元貸款隨之上漲。

articles.title: Apple Plans Camera AirPods Alongside Upgraded Foldable iPhone in 2027
articles.summary: Apple Inc.’s upcoming camera-equipped AirPods, a product meant to vault the company into the AI device market, is scheduled to launch in late 2027 as part of a flurry of new releases.
articles.title_zh: Apple 計劃在 2027 年推出配備攝像頭的 AirPods 和升級版可摺疊 iPhone
articles.summary_zh: Apple 計劃在 2027 年末推出配備攝像頭的 AirPods，作為公司進入 AI 設備市場的舉措，並進行一系列新品發佈。

articles.title: Ripple Buys Stake in Flutterwave Valuing It at $3.3 Billion
articles.summary: Flutterwave Inc., one of Africa’s most valuable financial-technology startups, sold an equity stake to Ripple, as it seeks to accelerate growth through payments expansion and strategic partnerships.
articles.title_zh: Ripple 收購 Flutterwave 股份，估值達 33 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 非洲最有價值的金融科技新創公司之一 Flutterwave 將股份出售給 Ripple，以加速業務增長和戰略合作。

articles.title: AI Is Training Staff Very Quickly, Says RBC's McKay
articles.summary: Royal Bank of Canada Chief Executive Officer Dave McKay says it's "unbelievable" how fast artificial intelligence is training staffers. He says the technology is also making workers more efficient. He spoke to Lisa Abramowicz on Tuesday at a Bloomberg Newsmakers event in Toronto. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 加拿大皇家銀行首席執行官：AI 培訓員工速度驚人
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大皇家銀行首席執行官 Dave McKay 表示人工智慧培訓員工的速度「令人難以置信」，並提高員工工作效率。

articles.title: World Cup Exposes Growing Global Prediction Market Rift
articles.summary: This year’s World Cup is the first since prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket exploded to popularity as a new way to bet on sports.
articles.title_zh: 世界盃暴露全球預測市場日益擴大的分歧
articles.summary_zh: 今年世界盃是 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 等預測市場爆紅以來首次作為體育博彩新方式使用。

articles.title: Moody's: Private Credit Faces 2028 Test
articles.summary: Marc Pinto, the Global Head of Private Credit at Moody's Ratings, joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why private credit is entering a pivotal phase. While AI infrastructure spending is creating huge lending opportunities, cracks are beginning to emerge in software-focused portfolios. Pinto warns that the real test comes in 2028, when a wave of refinancing could expose which borrowers survive and which don't. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 穆迪：私募信貸面臨 2028 年考驗
articles.summary_zh: 穆迪評級公司全球私募信貸主管 Marc Pinto 解釋私募信貸進入關鍵階段的原因，AI 基礎設施投資帶來巨大融資機會，但軟體組合中出現裂縫。

articles.title: AI Driving 'Insatiable Appetite' for Capital, RBC's McKay Says
articles.summary: Royal Bank of Canada CEO David McKay says there is a risk-on attitude in the market right now, driven by the push for AI and computing capacity. He speaks with Lisa Abramowicz at a Bloomberg Newsmakers event. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 加拿大皇家銀行首席執行官：AI 驅動資本「無止境需求」
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大皇家銀行首席執行官 David McKay 表示當前市場存在風險偏好，由 AI 和計算能力推動。

articles.title: Principal Mineral Buys Cerberus-Backed Critical Materials Firm
articles.summary: Principal Mineral is buying a Cerberus Capital Management LP-backed firm that produces components for printed circuit boards, a key electronic part used in products from cars to planes to AI servers.
articles.title_zh: Principal Mineral 收購 Cerberus 支持的關鍵材料公司
articles.summary_zh: Principal Mineral 收購 Cerberus Capital Management 支持的公司，該公司生產印刷電路板組件，用於汽車、飛機和 AI 伺服器等產品。

articles.title: SpaceX Pounces on $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Days After IPO
articles.summary: Technically, SpaceX had 30 days following its record-shattering public debut to decide on a $60 billion takeover of the AI coding startup Cursor. In the end, all it took was two trading days.
articles.title_zh: SpaceX 在 IPO 後數日內迅速完成 60 億美元 Cursor 收購
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 在 IPO 後僅用兩個交易日就完成了對 AI 編碼新創公司 Cursor 的 60 億美元收購，遠快於規定的 30 天期限。

articles.title: SpaceX Cements $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Following IPO
articles.summary: SpaceX formally agreed to take over Cursor in a deal that values the artificial intelligence coding startup at $60 billion, cementing a key part of Elon Musk’s efforts to catch up with rivals on coding tools.
articles.title_zh: SpaceX 正式完成 60 億美元 Cursor 收購
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 正式同意收購 AI 編碼新創公司 Cursor，交易估值 60 億美元，鞏固 Elon Musk 在編碼工具方面追趕競爭對手的努力。

articles.title: The Executive Coach Showing Sam Altman How to Lead With ‘Emotional Fluidity’
articles.summary: Joe Hudson is sure the winners of the impending tech revolution will be human.
articles.title_zh: 行政教練展示 Sam Altman 如何以「情感流暢性」領導
articles.summary_zh: 行政教練 Joe Hudson 認為即將到來的科技革命的贏家將是人類。

articles.title: SpaceX Agrees to $60 Billion Cursor Takeover Post-IPO
articles.summary: SpaceX will take over Cursor in a deal that values the artificial intelligence coding startup at $60 billion, as Elon Musk aims to catch up with rivals on coding tools. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: SpaceX 同意 IPO 後進行 60 億美元 Cursor 收購
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 將收購 AI 編碼新創公司 Cursor，交易估值 60 億美元，Elon Musk 旨在追趕編碼工具競爭對手，預計交易將在第三季度完成。

articles.title: Poland Pursues Taiwan Investments to End Role as Assembly Hub
articles.summary: Poland is betting on a flood of investments and technology transfers from Taiwanese companies to reengineer its $1 trillion economy.
articles.title_zh: 波蘭追求台灣投資以終結組裝樞紐角色
articles.summary_zh: 波蘭期待台灣公司的投資和技術轉讓浪潮，以重塑其 1 兆美元的經濟。

articles.title: Microsoft’s Latest Surface PCs Offer Better Graphics, Faster AI
articles.summary: Microsoft Corp. introduced updated Surface Pro and Surface Laptop devices, refreshing both products with faster graphics and new chips from Qualcomm Inc. to more effectively court creative professionals and artificial intelligence super users.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 最新 Surface PC 提供更好圖形和更快 AI 性能
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft 推出更新的 Surface Pro 和 Surface Laptop 設備，配備 Qualcomm 新晶片，以更好地吸引創意專業人士和 AI 超級用戶。

articles.title: Startup Backed by Ex-Google CEO Debuts Industrial Robot With LG
articles.summary: A startup backed by former Google Chief Executive Officer Eric Schmidt unveiled an industrial robot powered by artificial intelligence, as investors pile into the emerging field of humanoids.
articles.title_zh: 前 Google 首席執行官支持的新創公司與 LG 推出工業機器人
articles.summary_zh: 由前 Google 首席執行官 Eric Schmidt 支持的新創公司推出由人工智慧驅動的工業機器人，投資者湧入新興的人形機器人領域。

articles.title: Siri AI Catching Up to Chatbot Competitors
articles.summary: Apple’s new Siri AI, despite mainly delivering on promises made two years ago, is good enough to help ease Apple out of its AI crisis, says Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss the advancements of Siri AI. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Siri AI 追趕聊天機器人競爭對手
articles.summary_zh: Apple 新推出的 Siri AI 基本兌現了兩年前的承諾，足以幫助 Apple 擺脫 AI 危機。

articles.title: Trump’s Anthropic Crackdown Sets Off AI Alarms for US Allies
articles.summary: With the recent crackdown on Anthropic, the Trump administration has given global leaders another reason to panic about their place in the technology race.
articles.title_zh: Trump 對 Anthropic 的打擊引發美國盟國 AI 警報
articles.summary_zh: Trump 政府對 Anthropic 的最近打擊讓全球領導人對其在科技競爭中的地位有了新的恐慌理由。

articles.title: French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
articles.summary: France’s domestic intelligence agency, DGSI, will replace Palantir Technologies Inc. data tools with a local alternative made by Chapsvision, as European countries increasingly seek to reduce their dependence on US tech firms.
articles.title_zh: 法國安全服務部門將用本地公司替代 Palantir
articles.summary_zh: 法國國內情報機構 DGSI 將用本地公司 Chapsvision 的產品替代 Palantir Technologies 資料工具，歐洲各國日益尋求減少對美國科技公司的依賴。

articles.title: Man Group Sees ‘Bubble Risks’ as AI Bond Sales Break Records
articles.summary: Man Group Plc says “bubble risks” are mounting as bond sales boom in the race to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure.
articles.title_zh: Man Group 警告 AI 債券發行創紀錄時出現「泡沫風險」
articles.summary_zh: Man Group 表示在人工智慧基礎設施建設競賽中債券發行創紀錄時，「泡沫風險」正在上升。

articles.title: Adani Ports Partners With Kaleris for AI Terminal Software
articles.summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s port unit is teaming up with US-based Kaleris to deploy an AI-driven software to operate the company’s 15 container terminals across nine ports.
articles.title_zh: Adani Ports 與 Kaleris 合作部署 AI 終端軟體
articles.summary_zh: 億萬富翁 Gautam Adani 的港口業務與美國 Kaleris 合作，在其九個港口的 15 個貨櫃碼頭部署 AI 驅動軟體。

articles.title: Dan Ives on US-Anthropic Talks, AI M&A, Open AI Losses
articles.summary: Dan Ives, global senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, discusses what he calls the “tug of war” between Anthropic and the Trump administration, why he expects accelerated M&A on artificial intelligence, and reported losses at OpenAI ahead of the company’s IPO later this year. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Dan Ives 談美國-Anthropic 談判、AI M&A 和 OpenAI 虧損
articles.summary_zh: Wedbush Securities 全球高級股票分析師 Dan Ives 討論 Anthropic 與 Trump 政府的「拉鋸戰」、對 AI M&A 加速的預期，以及 OpenAI 在今年 IPO 前的報告虧損。

articles.title: UK Regulator Weighs Cutting Data Center Power Use at Peak Times
articles.summary: The UK’s energy regulator is weighing whether future data centers should be required to reduce power consumption during periods of system stress, part of a broader effort to accommodate a surge in electricity demand from artificial intelligence and cloud computing.
articles.title_zh: 英國監管機構考慮在高峰時段減少資料中心用電
articles.summary_zh: 英國能源監管機構正在考慮是否要求未來資料中心在系統壓力時期減少用電，以應對人工智慧和雲計算帶來的電力需求激增。

articles.title: Goldman Traders See Room for Rally to Broaden Beyond AI Winners
articles.summary: Easing tensions in the Middle East is giving investors a new reason to look beyond the artificial intelligence trade that’s dominated the market narrative for most of the year.
articles.title_zh: 高盛交易員認為市場反彈空間超越 AI 贏家
articles.summary_zh: 中東局勢緩解為投資者提供了超越主導市場敘事的 AI 交易的新理由。

articles.title: Pentagon boasts of using AI to write reports mandated by Congress
articles.summary: The US Department of Defense has a lot of congressionally mandated homework to do every year involving hundreds of required reports on various national security topics. But Pentagon officials have been proudly describing a new shortcut—using generative AI tools to write such reports for Congress. Pentagon Chief Technology Officer Emil Michael highlighted AI-generated reports to Congress as a key example of how the Department of Defense—stylized as the Department of War under the Trump administration—has adopted generative AI during an event hosted by the Hudson Institute think tank in Washington, DC, on June 12. The Pentagon has made AI tools, starting with Google Cloud’s Gemini for Government, widely available to members of all six military branches through the department’s bespoke GenAI.
articles.title_zh: 五角大樓吹噓用 AI 撰寫國會委託報告
articles.summary_zh: 美國國防部利用生成式 AI 工具撰寫國會委託的數百份國家安全相關報告，成為新近推行的做法。

articles.title: Android 17 starts hitting Pixel phones and watches today
articles.summary: Android 17 has been in testing since early this year , with the final beta hitting devices just a couple of weeks ago. Insofar as a mature operating system like Android still has big days, this is one of them. The official Android 17 build is starting its rollout on Pixel phones , adding a small set of new features and laying the groundwork for the future. This release also coincides with a Pixel Drop and a new version of Wear OS (based on Android 17) on Pixel Watches. Google no longer uses an unmodified version of Android on its phones—the Pixel build includes numerous features that are distinct from Android 17 itself. Other device makers will include versions of some of these features when they eventually update their phones, but for now, Google's Pixel phones are the only way to experie
articles.title_zh: Android 17 今日開始向 Pixel 手機和手錶推送
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 已在年初進入測試，最終測試版於兩週前推送設備，正式版本開始在 Pixel 手機上推出。

articles.title: Trump admin abandons fight against wind energy as clean energy output surges
articles.summary: The Trump administration has abandoned its effort to halt wind energy projects across the United States and dropped its challenge to the court ruling that tossed President Donald Trump’s order freezing federal permitting and leasing for wind projects. States that challenged the order hailed the development as one of the most significant legal victories against the Trump White House’s campaign against the energy transition. On Monday, the US Court of Appeals for the First Circuit dismissed the appeal after the Justice Department filed a motion for its voluntary dismissal on June 10. The case against Trump’s executive order was filed in May 2025 by a coalition of attorneys general from 17 states and Washington, DC, led by New York Attorney General Letitia James. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 川普政府放棄對風能的對抗，潔淨能源產量激增
articles.summary_zh: 川普政府已放棄阻止美國風能項目的努力，並撤回對法院裁決的質疑，該裁決推翻了川普總統凍結聯邦風能項目許可和租賃的行政令。提出異議的州對此發展表示歡迎。

articles.title: SpaceX to acquire AI coding platform Cursor for $60 billion
articles.summary: SpaceX will acquire AI coding tool Cursor for $60 billion in an all-stock transaction, the companies announced today. The deal is expected to close in the third quarter. It comes just two days after SpaceX's unprecedented IPO and a few months after the merger of SpaceX and xAI, which brought a significant restructuring of xAI. Cursor was one of the first tools to fully bake features that leverage large language models into an IDE. It's a branch of Visual Studio Code with heavy AI integration. However, incumbent platforms and bigger AI companies have since rolled out comparable features. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: SpaceX 以 60 億美元收購 AI 編碼平台 Cursor
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 將以全股票交易方式以 60 億美元收購 AI 編碼工具 Cursor，該交易預計在第三季度完成。這是在 SpaceX 創紀錄的 IPO 後僅兩天宣布的。

articles.title: Leaked financial docs show OpenAI is losing billions of dollars a year
articles.summary: As OpenAI files SEC paperwork ahead of an expected initial public stock offering, newly leaked financial documents show a company with quickly growing revenues that are currently being overwhelmed by even larger expenses. The audited financial statements, obtained by independent journalist Ed Zitron , show OpenAI's reported revenue growing from $3.7 billion in 2024 to $13.07 billion in 2025. The Financial Times, which reviewed the same documents , writes that the company's monthly revenues had grown to nearly $2 billion by the end of 2025, suggesting that its ongoing revenue rates continued to grow throughout the year. R&amp;D expenses alone still easily outpace OpenAI's quickly growing revenues. Credit: Ars Technica But the company's fast-growing revenues are still dwarfed by its even
articles.title_zh: 洩露的財務文件顯示 OpenAI 年虧損數十億美元
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 在提交 SEC 文件準備進行首次公開募股之際，新洩露的財務文件顯示該公司收入快速增長，但支出更加龐大。審計財務報表由獨立記者 Ed Zitron 獲得。

articles.title: Mobileye is entering the US robotaxi market with standalone service
articles.summary: The driving technology company Mobileye plans to launch a robotaxi service in an as-yet-unnamed US city in 2027, it said earlier today. The service will be vertically integrated, using Mobileye's Moovit mobility platform to interact with customers booking rides, coordinate drivers, and so on. The Israeli company, which was bought by Intel in 2017 before going public again in 2022, says it will start with around 100 robotaxis early next year. "Mobileye has spent more than two decades building the technologies required for autonomous driving," said Amnon Shashua, founder and CEO of Mobileye. "Today we are taking the next step: combining those technologies with operational ownership to create a financially and geographically scalable robotaxi business designed from the ground up for global de
articles.title_zh: Mobileye 推出獨立自動駕駛計程車服務進入美國市場
articles.summary_zh: 駕駛技術公司 Mobileye 計劃在 2027 年於美國某城市推出自動駕駛計程車服務，該服務將垂直整合，使用 Mobileye 的 Moovit 出行平台與客戶互動和協調司機。

articles.title: The Ars Technica 2026 Reader Survey: Let your voice be heard!
articles.summary: Greetings, Arsians, and welcome to the great Ars Technica 2026 reader survey ! It has been almost four years since we last ran a big site-wide survey like this, where we ask our readers—you!—what you like about the work we do and what we could perhaps improve on. This kind of check-in is absolutely vital to ensuring we're steering the ship properly, and we take the results very seriously. (The last time we did this, we got several thousand responses, and that's incredibly valuable data for us!) You don't have to have been a reader since 1998 to weigh in, either. Whether you're a first-time reader, an old grizzled forum veteran, a front page comment maven, a newbie sysadmin, or a CEO, we want to hear what you have to say, no matter who you are. The only requirement is that you're a human! (
articles.title_zh: Ars Technica 2026 讀者調查：讓您的聲音被聽見！
articles.summary_zh: Ars Technica 歡迎您參與 2026 年讀者調查！這是近四年來首次進行的全站調查，我們想了解讀者對我們工作的看法以及可能需要改進的地方。

articles.title: Critical Copilot vulnerability allowed hackers to steal 2FA code from users
articles.summary: Last Tuesday, Microsoft patched a vulnerability it rated as max critical in its M365 Copilot AI platform. On Monday, the researchers who discovered the vulnerability and reported it to Microsoft revealed how their proof-of-concept exploit could retrieve 2FA codes and other sensitive data from emails accessible to Copilot. Microsoft and other LLM providers have been unable to prevent their products from complying with malicious requests to reveal data. The root cause: AI bots are unable to distinguish between instructions provided by users and those snuck into third-party content the models are summarizing, drafting responses to, or using to perform other actions on behalf of the user. With no way to secure this crucial boundary, Microsoft and its peers are left to erect complicated and ad
articles.title_zh: Copilot 的重大漏洞允許駭客竊取用戶的雙因素驗證碼
articles.summary_zh: 微軟於上週二修補了其 M365 Copilot AI 平台中的最高危漏洞。發現該漏洞的研究人員於週一披露了他們的概念驗證利用方式如何能夠從電子郵件中檢索雙因素驗證碼和其他敏感數據。

articles.title: Commodore’s newest gadget is a flip phone that blocks social media and browsers
articles.summary: The next gadget to bear the storied Commodore branding will be a flip phone. The name behind the bestselling desktop PC in history came back about a year ago. Christian “Peri Fractic” Simpson, best known for running the Retro Recipes (now known as Retro Recipes x Commodore ) YouTube channel, acquired the Commodore Corporation and "100 percent of the original and official trademarks that defined the Commodore name since 1983,” per a July 2025 press release. Simpson said the price was “in the low seven figures.” Since the acquisition, the brand released the Commodore 64 Ultimate and the Commodore 64X PC , a mini PC housed in a chassis that resembles the Commodore 64. Today, the new Commodore announced a new device in a dated design: a flip phone. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: Commodore 最新產品是可阻止社群媒體和瀏覽器的翻蓋手機
articles.summary_zh: 下一個採用 Commodore 品牌的產品將是一款翻蓋手機。這個以製造暢銷桌上型電腦而聞名的品牌於一年前重新推出。由 Retro Recipes YouTube 頻道負責人 Christian Simpson 收購該品牌。

articles.title: 新加坡啟用新AI超級電腦Aspire 2B，搭載逾1,500顆H200打造115PF總算力
articles.summary:
新加坡國家超級電腦中心（NSCC）近期宣布新一代國家級超級電腦Aspire 2B正式投入運作，主打AI運算與大型模型訓練能力，其整體效能約為前一代系統提升數倍。
Aspire 2B採用超過1,500顆的Nvidia H200 GPU，其峰值總運算力可達約115 PF，將投入當地的人工智慧、氣候模擬與科學研究等國家級應用。
Aspire 2B在設計上明顯從過去以科學模擬為主的高效能運算（HPC），轉向以AI為核心的混合工作負載架構，包括大型語言模型（LLM）訓練與推論、氣候與環境模擬、量子運算與跨領域科學研究、政府與研究機構AI應用。
articles.title_zh: 新加坡啟用新AI超級電腦Aspire 2B，搭載逾1,500顆H200打造115PF總算力
articles.summary_zh:
新加坡國家超級電腦中心（NSCC）近期宣布新一代國家級超級電腦Aspire 2B正式投入運作，主打AI運算與大型模型訓練能力，其整體效能約為前一代系統提升數倍。
Aspire 2B採用超過1,500顆的Nvidia H200 GPU，其峰值總運算力可達約115 PF，將投入當地的人工智慧、氣候模擬與科學研究等國家級應用。
Aspire 2B在設計上明顯從過去以科學模擬為主的高效能運算（HPC），轉向以AI為核心的混合工作負載架構，包括大型語言模型（LLM）訓練與推論、氣候與環境模擬、量子運算與跨領域科學研究、政府與研究機構AI應用。

articles.title: 冒充官員鎖定CEO！波蘭政府警告大型企業當心社交工程威脅
articles.summary: 波蘭數位事務部於6月12日發布警訊，引述該國網路安全全權代表揭露的調查指出，近期出現偽冒當地政府官員的社交工程活動。駭客試圖藉此與大型企業執行長取得聯繫，最終目的可能在於竊取敏感資料、植入惡意軟體或詐取資金。

articles.title: 1Password推執行時憑證派發機制，減少工作負載長期持有權杖
articles.summary: 1Password發表1Password Credential Broker私有測試版，把憑證管理從人員使用情境延伸到機器工作負載。該服務首波支援GitHub Actions，讓自動建置、測試與部署流程在執行時，依照身分與政策取得所需憑證，減少長期權杖留在環境變數、設定檔或自動化流程中的情況。1Password預告，今年稍晚Credential Broker將延伸到AI代理憑證管理。

articles.title: Jenkins修補重大遠端執行程式碼漏洞，攻擊者已開始利用漏洞試圖入侵企業CI/CD環境
articles.summary: 資安業者Defused Cyber於6月15日警告，開源自動化CI/CD平臺Jenkins的遠端執行程式碼漏洞CVE-2026-53435，已遭攻擊者實際利用，可能影響企業CI/CD建置流程的安全性，用戶應儘速升級至已修補的2.568版與LTS 2.555.3版。

articles.title: Apple以Swift改寫TrueType微調直譯器，降低記憶體安全風險且較C語言版快13%
articles.summary: Apple公開一項以Swift改寫TrueType字型微調直譯器的實務案例，並釋出相關原始碼作為參考實作。Apple資安團隊說明，該改寫實作已在2025年秋季版Apple平臺採用，目標是降低字型解析過程中的記憶體安全風險，維持與原C版本一致的字型顯示結果。官方說明，該實作是已用於生產環境的程式碼，開源目的是供外界參考的實作範例，並非一個持續維護的專案。

articles.title: 美國政府要求Anthropic停止對外國用戶提供Claude Fable 5，原因是傳出有人能成功越獄
articles.summary: 上週Anthropic正式發表Claude Fable 5與Mythos 5，不料3天後突然因美國政府禁令被迫宣布停用，該公司研判當局可能是因為得知存在對Fable 5進行越獄的方法而祭出禁令，他們表示，政府掌握的應該是狹義且非通用的越獄手段，並認為這是誤會。然而，有科技新聞網站指出，傳出至少有兩組研究團隊已能成功越獄。

articles.title: 2026年CVE數量恐破6.6萬個，FIRST國際資安應變組織提四項應對建議
articles.summary: 每年CVE數量創新高已非新鮮事，但增幅更是各界觀察的重點。FIRST國際資安應變組織於6月15日舉行第38屆年會，同時發布「2026年年中漏洞預測報告」，當中指出今年登記在案的CVE漏洞數量將呈現史無前例的激增。根據FIRST最新公布資料顯示，2026年1至4月的實際披露量已較原先預估多出約6,420個漏洞，比例高出46.3%，這使得全年總量從2月份預估的59,427個，現在上修至約66,000個。

articles.title: 資料中心光通訊技術競爭日益激烈　2027年XPO量產商機有望後發先至
articles.summary: DIGITIMES觀察，Arista Networks在OFC 2026發表超高密度可插拔光學(XPO)，不同於CPO革命性技術創新，XPO以工程設計思維優化可插拔光學模組，延續光學模組既有生態系優勢。XPO兼具高頻寬密度、節省空間、維護性高和技術轉換門檻低等優點；然而XPO未能解決電訊號傳輸的物理極限，目前CPO仍為資料中心長......
